scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/types && npm run build -w packages/validators && npm run build -w packages/config && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/website && npm run build -w apps/admin
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/website && npm run lint -w apps/admin
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/types && npm run typecheck -w packages/validators && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/website && npm run typecheck -w apps/admin
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run build -w packages/types && npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
